purpose: Block story-to-TDD runs when runtime, test, adapter, CLI, or implementation code appears without generated projection authority and receipts.
passConditions: target code artifact path is declared
conformance evidence exists before release claims
blockConditions: runtime code added without projection manifest
test code added without generated test receipt
implementation code added by manual edit
adapter code added without semantic authority
CLI code added outside generated doorway materialization
completionPosture: Code is acceptable only as a generated projection from declared semantic authority.
